zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.於1470年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾吉爾林 易亞斯特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Fairfax23歲，母親Elizabeth Sherburne14歲。他於1497年與Anne Gascoigne在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年11月26日在英國越可爾沃爾頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾吉爾林 易亞斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.于1470年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾吉爾林 易亞斯特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Fairfax23岁，母亲Elizabeth Sherburne14岁。他于1497年与Anne Gascoigne在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年11月26日在英国越可爾沃爾頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾吉爾林 易亞斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. was born in 1470, in Gilling East, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Fairfax, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Sherburne, was 14. He married Anne Gascoigne in 1497, in Walton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 26 November 1520, in Walton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Gilling East, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. est né en 1470, à Gilling East, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Fairfax, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sherburne, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Anne Gascoigne en 1497, à Walton, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 26 novembre 1520, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Gilling East, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. 1470 in Gilling East, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Fairfax 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Sherburne 14. Er hat 1497 in Walton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Gascoigne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 26. November 1520 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Walton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Gilling East, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.が1470年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアギリング エアストで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Fairfaxは23歳，母Elizabeth Sherburneは14歳であった。1497年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアワルトンでAnne Gascoigneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年11月26日にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアギリング エアストにて埋葬された。

ko.Gilling East, North Yorkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 길링 이스트

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt.(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 길링 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Fairfax(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Sherburne(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 월턴에서 Anne Gascoigne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 11월 26일 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 길링 이스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. nasceu em 1470, em Gilling East, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Fairfax, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sherburne, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Gascoigne em 1497, em Walton, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1520, em Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Gilling East, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Holly Cross Churchyard, Gilling East, Ry: джиллинг эаст, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Fairfax, Knt. родился в 1470 г. в местности джиллинг эаст, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Fairfax было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sherburne, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Gascoigne в 1497 г. в местности валтон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 26 ноября 1520 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности джиллинг эаст, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Anne Gascoigne en 1497, en Walton, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas.
